reference: GUESS A MAN GETS USED TO ANYTHING HELL MAYBE I CAN HIRE SOME BUMS TO SIT AROUND AND WHOOP IT UP WHEN THE SHIPS COME IN AND BILL THIS AS A REAL OLD MARTIAN DEN OF SIN
text: Guess a man gets used to anything. Hell, maybe I can hire some bums to sit around and whoop it up when the ships come in, and build this as a real old Martian den of sin.
